name: Should I delete my AI chats about my Phoenix crash before talking to a lawyer?

mainEntity.name: Should I delete my AI chats about my Phoenix crash before talking to a lawyer?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, deletion risks spoliation sanctions; preserve everything.[1] Courts view it as hiding evidence.[1] Key factors: discoverability anyway via providers; intent inference; ethical duties.[1] Screenshot and share with counsel; use secure storage; never alter.[1] Transparency builds trust.
